allow: Bash(# Check for CUDA in common locations for dir in ""C:/Program Files/NVIDIA GPU Computing Toolkit/CUDA"" ""C:/CUDA"" ""$CUDA_PATH"" ""$CUDA_HOME""; do if [ -d ""$dir"" ] ; then echo ""Found: $dir"" ls ""$dir"" fi done # Check env vars echo ""CUDA_PATH=$CUDA_PATH"" echo ""CUDA_HOME=$CUDA_HOME"" # Search for nvcc find ""C:/Program Files"" -name ""nvcc.exe"" -maxdepth 5)
Bash(# Check for VS Build Tools or VS installation find ""C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio"" ""C:/Program Files \(x86\)/Microsoft Visual Studio"" -name ""cl.exe"" -maxdepth 10)
Bash(# Check if MSVC has cl.exe find ""D:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/2022/Community"" -name ""cl.exe"" -maxdepth 10)

Bash(# Check for CUDA toolkit in all common locations for base in ""C:/Program Files"" ""D:/Program Files"" ""C:/NVIDIA"" ""D:/NVIDIA""; do find ""$base"" -name ""nvcc.exe"" -maxdepth 8 done # Check registry-style env vars cmd.exe /c ""echo %CUDA_PATH%"" # Check if nvidia-smi reports CUDA version nvidia-smi)
Bash(# Check the big ones - what''s in .cache? du -sh /c/Users/yuyic/.cache/*/)
Bash(# Check what''s in Temp that''s large du -sh /c/Users/yuyic/AppData/Local/Temp/*/)
